'''Chambamakk''' was a [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] who worked to free the Wookiees on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] [[Slavery/Legends|enslaved]] by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]]. After the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], he sought to track down those who brought suffering upon the Wookiees and kill them.

{{Char-stub}}
